title: epipactis violacea
intro: Epipactis violacea, also known as the purple helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis violacea include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Epipactis violacea is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk remedies for its supposed antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
